untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental valuation metrics (price/historical average ratio, absolute 20+ year return thresholds) and market breadth data (% new highs deterioration) which are not available in the allowed technical indicator set. The 3.5x valuation ratio threshold and breadth-based entry conditions cannot be translated to technical indicators without fundamental/breadth data feeds.
translation_notes: Approximated the bubble-like behavior using: (1) log_returns > 2.5 to represent extreme 250%+ appreciation on log scale; (2) price_pos_20 > 0.85 as proxy for elevated valuation position; (3) vol_ratio_20 < 0.5 to represent deteriorating participation (fewer participants = lower relative volume). Exit at +100% profit uses returns > 1.0 (100% on log scale). Stop-loss set at 30% retracement as specified. Note: This is a lossy translation—ideally requires custom fundamental and breadth indicators.
